executive_verdict.primary_failure_mode: Architecture-owned gates are green; marketing independent verification is fail and health monitor has 2 escalated critical issues.
executive_verdict.most_urgent_fix: Resolve the 2 escalated health monitor issues (push research timeout at 14 repeats, blocked-channel-recovery timeout_risk at 95 repeats) and get a fresh marketing independent verification pass.

audit_metadata.scheduler_inspection_method: direct openclaw cron list --json plus live artifact cross-checks
live_last_error_job_names: Push research findings to git repo

findings.title: Marketing independent verification is fail
findings.mechanism: Marketing independent verifier returns fail — no measurable primary-repo adoption movement detected. Artifact is 410 minutes stale (last checked 2026-06-02 15:16).
findings.root_cause: Marketing outcome evidence for primary-repo adoption is still absent.
findings.recommended_fix: Marketing owner loop must produce fresh measurable outcome evidence and rerun marketing independent verification.

findings.title: Push research findings to git repo — escalated (14 repeats)
findings.mechanism: Recurring timeout AbortError at 14 repeats in recent history. Escalation level: critical.
findings.root_cause: Repeated AbortError: This operation was aborted — timeout at 6 min of 60 min limit.
findings.recommended_fix: Root-cause the push research abort pattern; 14 repeats at critical escalation demands process/watchdog repair.

findings.title: blocked-channel-recovery — escalated (95 repeats)
findings.mechanism: Recurring timeout_risk at 95 repeats. Duration 890s vs 600s limit (148%). Escalation level: critical.
findings.root_cause: Unblocker runs consistently at near-timeout duration, indicating the blocked-channel recovery path is structurally slow.
findings.recommended_fix: Profile and optimize the blocked-channel-recovery path; 95 repeats at critical escalation demands architectural repair, not bandaids.

findings.title: Live Gateway topology has 1 error job
findings.mechanism: Push research findings to git repo is in error state with 1 consecutive error. 4 jobs are currently running, 0 disabled.
findings.root_cause: Push research abort error matches escalated health monitor finding.
findings.recommended_fix: Already covered by escalated health monitor issue — same job.

findings.title: Architecture verifier path is green
findings.mechanism: Architecture independent verification is qualified_pass (fresh at 22:07); verifier passes; loop integrity both loops ok; docs quality independently verified pass.
findings.root_cause: Architecture-side gates are healthy and freshly verified.

findings.title: Market intelligence consumption verified across all consumers
findings.mechanism: All 4 code-backed consumers show loaded status with fresh artifacts.
findings.root_cause: Shared market-intelligence consumption is machine-verifiable and current.
findings.recommended_fix: Continue to verify consumer freshness on each watchdog run.

ordered_fix_plan.goal: Root-cause and repair escalated blocked-channel-recovery (95 repeats, critical)
ordered_fix_plan.why_now: 95 repeats at critical escalation — this is the most repeated failure in the system. Needs architectural optimization, not more runs.
ordered_fix_plan.expected_effect: Drops the highest-repeat escalation and restores unblocker reliability.

ordered_fix_plan.goal: Root-cause and repair escalated push research timeout (14 repeats, critical)
ordered_fix_plan.why_now: 14 repeats at critical escalation with consistent AbortError pattern.
ordered_fix_plan.expected_effect: Clears the error job and removes the site-domain escalation.

ordered_fix_plan.goal: Get a fresh marketing independent pass
ordered_fix_plan.why_now: Marketing verification artifact is 410 minutes stale and still fail. Blocks whole-stack certification.
ordered_fix_plan.expected_effect: Either clears the adoption blocker or preserves truthful fail-closed state with fresher evidence.

repairs_applied_this_run.change: Refreshed against live openclaw cron list --json: 26 enabled, 0 disabled, 4 running (precheck, health-monitor, reddit-watchdog, architecture-watchdog), 1 error (push research).

Ran fresh independent verification pass: architecture verifier passes, loop integrity both ok, docs quality pass, market intelligence all consumers loaded. Marketing verification still fail external to architecture.

independent_verification.summary: Independent verification confirms the repaired architecture verifier now fails closed on stale signoff, the live loop topology/ownership checks remain green, and shared market-intelligence reuse stays machine-verifiable.
qualified_external_blockers: health_monitor_escalations: 2 critical (push research timeout 14 repeats, blocked-channel-recovery timeout_risk 95 repeats)

what_still_needs_independent_verificatio: Fresh marketing independent pass backed by measurable primary-repo movement.
Resolution of 2 escalated critical health monitor issues.

highest_risk_unresolved_issue.title: blocked-channel-recovery at 95 repeats critical escalation + marketing verification fail
highest_risk_unresolved_issue.why: 95 repeats is the highest failure count in the system and represents a structural timeout pattern. Combined with stale marketing verification at 410m, these are the two external blockers preventing whole-stack green.
